# Phase 10.0.26 Evidence Attestation Plan

Phase: 10.0.26 - Constitutional Governance Evidence, Witnessing, Multi-Party Attestation & Institutional Verification Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only handoff note. Runtime remains disabled.

## Scope

Add governance-only doctrine for constitutional evidence, governance witnessing, multi-party attestation, institutional verification, evidence-chain continuity, governance truth validation, distributed legitimacy survivability, anti-unilateral governance, review-chain survivability, quorum philosophy, evidence custody, institutional trust decentralization, and the phase summary.

## Repository State

Repository classification remains UNSTABLE because unrelated runtime/app drift, generated Prisma artifacts, many untracked paths, and branch-ahead divergence are present. This plan does not clean, revert, stage, commit, repair, verify, attest, witness, or mutate those changes.

## Non-Runtime Constraint

This plan creates no runtime enablement, APIs, providers, adapters, credentials, OAuth, Prisma/Supabase changes, Twilio/email execution, background jobs, automatic attestation, automatic witnessing, automatic verification, repository repair, staging, commits, branch repair, destructive git operations, deployment authority, quorum software, institutional access systems, or infrastructure activation.
